steps.title: Interpret the slope
steps.content: In $g(m)=-0.04m+13.2$, the slope is $-0.04$. The negative sign means the amount of gasoline left decreases as miles driven increase.

steps.title: Use the positive rate
steps.content: For each additional mile, the gasoline left decreases by $0.04$ gallon. That means the car uses $0.04$ gallon per mile. The answer is A.
